title: The Atlantic Monthly, Volume 10, No. 58, August, 1862: A Magazine of Literature, Art, and Politics

The text critiques the existing gymnasium systems for primarily serving young men, expressing a strong belief that a new approach to physical training is essential for promoting health and vitality across all age groups.
